planMd:
# Plan: Create Complete Landing Page for IELTS Journey

## Summary

Build a modern, simple, professional, and production-ready landing page for IELTS Journey with all specified sections, responsive design, and SEO.

## Tasks

1. Create Hero Section Component in src/components/HeroSection.tsx
2. Create Problem Section Component in src/components/ProblemSection.tsx (depends on: Create Hero Section Component in src/components/HeroSection.tsx)
3. Create Solution Section Component in src/components/SolutionSection.tsx (depends on: Create Problem Section Component in src/components/ProblemSection.tsx)
4. Create Feature Section Component in src/components/FeatureSection.tsx (depends on: Create Solution Section Component in src/components/SolutionSection.tsx)
5. Create How It Works Section Component in src/components/HowItWorksSection.tsx (depends on: Create Feature Section Component in src/components/FeatureSection.tsx)
6. Create AI Tutor Section Component in src/components/AITutorSection.tsx (depends on: Create How It Works Section Component in src/components/HowItWorksSection.tsx)
7. Create Dashboard Preview Section Component in src/components/DashboardPreviewSection.tsx (depends on: Create AI Tutor Section Component in src/components/AITutorSection.tsx)
8. Create Product Value Section Component in src/components/ProductValueSection.tsx (depends on: Create Dashboard Preview Section Component in src/components/DashboardPreviewSection.tsx)
9. Create Recruitment and Portfolio Section Component in src/components/RecruitmentSection.tsx (depends on: Create Product Value Section Component in src/components/ProductValueSection.tsx)
10. Create Donation and Support Section Component in src/components/DonationSection.tsx (depends on: Create Recruitment and Portfolio Section Component in src/components/RecruitmentSection.tsx)
11. Create FAQ Section Component in src/components/FAQSection.tsx (depends on: Create Donation and Support Section Component in src/components/DonationSection.tsx)
12. Create Final CTA Section Component in src/components/FinalCTASection.tsx (depends on: Create FAQ Section Component in src/components/FAQSection.tsx)
13. Create Footer Component in src/components/Footer.tsx (depends on: Create Final CTA Section Component in src/components/FinalCTASection.tsx)
14. Create Landing Page Container Component in src/pages/LandingPage.tsx (depends on: Create Footer Component in src/components/Footer.tsx)
15. Add SEO Metadata and Accessibility Improvements in src/pages/LandingPage.tsx and src/components/Layout.tsx (depends on: Create Landing Page Container Component in src/pages/LandingPage.tsx)
16. Integrate Landing Page into Application Routing in src/App.tsx (depends on: Add SEO Metadata and Accessibility Improvements in src/pages/LandingPage.tsx and src/components/Layout.tsx)
17. Perform Responsive Design and Accessibility Testing for Landing Page (depends on: Integrate Landing Page into Application Routing in src/App.tsx)

# Final Report

You are a senior product designer, frontend engineer, and landing page copywriter.
